market_events: Greek feta import tariff review in progress — monitor for Q3 impact
Grubhub offering 0% commission for first 30 days to new Market partners
USDA: chicken breast prices stabilizing after Q1 spike

replies.author: UMD_Alumni_Fan
replies.text: Been going here since 2019. Aarav is still there and still the fastest checkout on campus.

replies.author: BudgetStudentEats
replies.text: $14 for a gyro wrap seems steep vs Chipotle at $11 nearby. Worth it for the taste but the gap is growing.

replies.author: StudyBreakSnacker
replies.text: Sophia always remembers to ask if you want baklava with your order. Great upsell, great girl.

replies.author: TerpFan2024
replies.text: Best late-night spot near UMD. The gyro is massive and the staff is super fast after midnight.
